reviews.comment: This cafeteria offers an excellent dining experience with delicious, fresh food and a clean, comfortable environment. What truly stood out was the outstanding service by Nikhil. He was polite, attentive, and very professional, making sure everything was perfect throughout the meal. His friendly attitude and quick service added a personal touch that made the experience even more enjoyable. Overall, the cafeteria maintains high standards in both food and service. Highly recommended!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for the wonderful feedback! We’re glad you enjoyed the fresh food, clean and comfortable ambience, and attentive service. Your kind words truly mean a lot—hope to welcome you again soon.

reviews.comment:
I had come to Tribeca for some farewell shopping, and thought of checked out coffee island. They have good options for combo. Since I wasn’t too hungry we tried their croissant combo that comes with a beverage.

Me being a coffee lover, I’m quite particular on the flavour and depth of the coffee. I had ordered for cappuccino and it was good. Also the croissant was perfect to our taste.

I would definitely recommend this place tor coffee and food.
PS: Rewa really did a good service and made is comfortable.

reviewReply.comment: We’re glad you enjoyed the cappuccino, croissant, and found the coffee up to your expectations. Happy to know you felt comfortable and would recommend us, hope to welcome you again soon.
